coaching.title: Today's Run
coaching.message: Build phase, 14 weeks out. Tuesday is a quality day: 70–80 min with 5 x 4 min uphill efforts at threshold (Zone 4), easy jog down between. Find the steepest sustained grade you can — the Julian Alps 50K throws ~2500m of vert at you, so teach your legs to climb strong when fatigued. Keep the flats and warmup in Zone 2.

coaching.title: Fuel Right
coaching.message: Train the gut today. Take 60g carbs per hour on the run — alternate a gel (~22g) every 30 min with a few sips of carb drink. Practice now so 60–90g/hr feels routine by race day. Post-run within 30 min: ~30g protein + ~60g carbs (e.g. Greek yogurt, banana, honey, granola).

coaching.title: Recovery
coaching.message: After hill repeats your calves and Achilles take the load. Spend 8–10 min foam rolling calves, quads, and glutes tonight, then elevate legs against a wall for 5 min. Prioritize 7.5–8 hrs sleep — if you're crossing time zones this week, anchor to local morning light and skip the late caffeine.

coaching.title: Mental Edge
coaching.message: Build phase is where the race is quietly won. Today's uphill reps are a rehearsal for the long alpine climbs in Slovenia — when your legs burn, practice the cue you'll use on race day: 'relax the shoulders, shorten the stride, keep climbing.' Consistency over heroics. 101 days out, every solid session compounds.
